analysis: You opened on 14 July with a rough 5h 57m, then bounced back hard with a 9h 22m recovery night that included your best REM of the whole stretch at 2h 12m — the routine is clearly doing something. The middle of the week held solid, with three nights clustering between 7h 15m and 7h 55m, and that 53 minutes of deep sleep on the 17th is genuinely impressive. The last two nights have been the wobble — awake time crept up to 51 minutes and then 1h 22m on the 20th, which is worth watching, and REM dipped back below 1h 45m both nights. The intervention stack is working when it lands; the question is what's different on the nights your body decides to throw a little chaos party at 3am.
